error.captcha_expired: CAPTCHA has expired. Please verify again.
error.confirm_password: Confirm password does not match password.
error.email_otp_send_required: Please send a verification code to this email first.
error.email_otp_verify_required: Please verify this email before registering.
error.full_name_length: Full name must be between 1 and 100 characters.
error.microsoft_redirect_response_missing: Microsoft returned to the app, but the login response could not be processed.
error.missing_access_token: Login response does not include access token.
error.password: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and digits.
error.phone: Please enter a valid international phone number.
error.phone_max_length: Phone number with country code cannot exceed 16 characters.
error.phone_singapore: Please enter a valid Singapore phone number, e.g. +6561234567 or +6581234567.
error.reset_token_missing: Password reset token is missing or invalid.
error.social_login_exchange_failed: Could not complete social login with the server.
error.social_login_failed: Social login failed. Please try again.
error.social_login_missing_provider_token: Social provider did not return a login token.
error.user_id: User ID can contain letters, digits, spaces, and + - _ . @ only.
error.user_id_length: User ID must be between 6 and 256 characters.

forgot_password.description: Provide your user ID to reset your password. An email will be sent to your mailbox with the link to reset your password.
forgot_password.email_sent: A reset link has been sent for {userId}. Please check your email.
forgot_password.title: Reset your password

link.already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

login.stay_signed_in: Stay signed in for the next 14 days
login.title: Sign in

register.description: To register as a Learner you need to fill in the following information.
register.email_otp_sent: Verification code has been sent to your email.
register.title: Register as a Learner

reset_password.description: Enter the new password and confirm password to initialize the password. Password must contain uppercase, lowercase and digits.
reset_password.request_new_link_description: The reset link may be expired or invalid. Request a new reset link to continue.
reset_password.title: Initialize your password

tooltip.email: Provide a valid email address to receive emails from this platform.
tooltip.full_name: Enter your full legal name as shown on your identity document.
tooltip.password: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and digits.
tooltip.phone_number: Select a country and enter your phone number.
tooltip.user_id: The user ID will be used as your sign-in identifier.

two_factor.email_notice: Verification code has been sent to the email address:
two_factor.expired: Verification code expired. Please resend a new code.
two_factor.resent: A new verification code has been sent.
two_factor.session_missing: Verification session is missing. Please sign in again.
two_factor.title: Two-factor verification
